title: Map Saver
description: A client only mod that allows you to save maps from item frames as images
body:
Saw a cool map art and want to save it? Shift-click the item frame and simply do it with Map Saver! This client-side mod allows you to save maps that players put in item frames by shift-clicking them.   ## Features  - A way to save maps from item frames both in singleplayer and multiplayer -An intuitive HUD to accomplish saving    ## How It Works  Simply shift-click an item frame with a map in it and a HUD will appear which will display the entire map you are saving. Press "Save As Image" and the map will be saved in `.minecraft/map_screenshots`

![Map Saver GUI preview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/406/629/2021-11-07_00.png)
